resources.string: D…Ēl…õ %1$.1f¬į%2$s eba shi k…õyash…õ ohusu ni ji %3$.1f¬į%2$s
M…Ēd…õŇč ni ok…õ data aba.txt k…õj…õ os…õ…õva
K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē…Ē: K…õŐĀ ok…õ n…Ē ni y…Ē…Ē Ňčw…õi n…õ…õ tsu nii l…õ, ebaany…õ ek…õ batri l…õ atsu nii oya fe b…Ē ni ofe…Ē daa l…õ
K…Ē…Ēy…Ē…Ē ni y…Ē…Ē s…õ…õgb…õ Su Picker
N…Ē ni abaany…õ ahala: Kusum URL
Custom URL l…õ jeee n…Ē ni ato, loo eb…õ n…Ē ko n…Ē ko. Obaany…õ oya gb…õjian…Ētoo mli koni ok…õ URL ni afee l…õ di…õŇčts…õ afata he
Data URL l…õ b…õ n…Ē ko
T…Ēm…Ē ko ba be mli ni ab…Ē…Ē m…Ēd…õŇč ni atsake b…Ē ni ak…õtsu…Ē nii ahaa l…õ
Eyeee ak…õ ek…õ %1$s data l…õ k…õ %2$s data l…õ baafata he
Efeee n…Ē ko ni ts…Ē…Ē saji ni ats…Ē…Ē mli
Eny…õŇč etsu k…Ē…Ēy…ĒŇč tsakem…Ē he saji k…õj…õ os…õ…õva l…õ n…Ē jogbaŇčŇč, titri l…õ %1$s saji l…õ
Ňämaa URL k…õya ogb…õjian…Ētoo l…õ mli.txt
N…Ē ni ats…Ē…Ē hi…õ ats…Ē…Ē \'%1$s\' l…õ ejaaa, kw…õm…Ē ogb…õjian…Ētoo faili l…õ ni oka ekoŇčŇč
N…Ē ni ts…Ē…Ē hi…õ URL jeee set, tsakem…Ē gb…õjian…Ētoo.txt k…õha tsakem…Ē
Ny…õjiea Ny…õhe ni W…Ēkane…Ē y…õ shń©a l…õ mli?
Atsake app n…õ…õ shi s…õ…õva ni ok…õtsaa l…õ etsakeee Inigo Plugin l…õ k…õha weeWX. Ekol…õ fields l…õ baaje kpo jogbaŇčŇč k…õyashi be mli ni abaasaa weeWX
N…Ē ni atsake l…õ ejaaa, tsakem…Ēi ni ato ni no s…õ…õ l…õ aka ekoŇčŇč

Amr…Ē n…õ…õ %1$s l…õ bi…Ē %2$s data faili k…õj…õ %3$s s…õ…õva l…õ n…Ē, ehe miihia ni otsake %4$s l…õ ni otsake %5$s faili l…õ dani app n…õ…õ atsu nii jogbaŇčŇč. Klikim…Ē Ok k…õha saji krokom…õi y…õ %6$s
Hanual tsakem…Ē, swipe refle screen ni ok…õwo mli
D…Ēl…õ %1$.1f¬į%2$s etee Ňčw…õi k…õyash…õ ohusu ni ji %3$.1f¬į%2$s
Ny…ĒŇčtsere l…õ nifeem…Ēi ni nyi…õ s…õ…õ l…õ?
Ak…õ n…Ē ko ni ajie…Ē loo app ko etoko
Adafitswaa he miihia koni ab…Ē bo k…Ēk…Ē k…õji d…Ēl…õ, nugb…Ēshiim…Ē loo nugb…Ēshiim…Ē sh…õ husui ni ato l…õ he
Ak…õni okpoo adafitswaa hegb…õ l…õ shii eny…Ē hew…Ē l…õ, ehe miihia ni oha etsu nii y…õ gb…õjian…Ētoo l…õ mli moŇč, je gb…õjian…Ētoo l…õ shishi?
Ofain…õ, m…õ be mli ni w…Ēkw…õ…Ē URL ni ok…õha l…õ
Eb…õ hewal…õ ni ok…õ rada mfoniri l…õ aba
Radar hen…Ē \'%1$s\' l…õ ejaaa, kw…õm…Ē ogb…õjian…Ētoo faili l…õ ni oka ekoŇčŇč
Radar URL jeee. Obaany…õ oya settings koni otsake
K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē…Ē daa gbi k…õji nugb…Ē l…õ sh…õ husu ni ok…õto l…õ he
Nugb…Ē ni n…õ…Ē %1$.2f%2$s k…õ ohusu ni ji %3$.2f%2$s l…õ kp√£a gbee
Nugb…Ē ni n…õ…Ē %1$.1f%2$s k…õ ohusu ni ji %3$.1f%2$s l…õ kp√£a gbee
Nugb…Ē ni n…õ…Ē %1$.2fin y…õ naagbee %2$d %3$s l…õ esh…õ \'Naa wa\' he
Nugb…Ē ni n…õ…Ē %1$.2fin y…õ naagbee %2$d %3$s l…õ esh…õ \'K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē…Ē\' he
Nugb…Ē ni n…õ…Ē %1$.2fin y…õ naagbee %2$d %3$s l…õ esh…õ \'Kw…õm…Ē\' he
Nugb…Ē ni n…õ…Ē %1$.1fmm y…õ naagbee %2$d %3$s l…õ esh…õ \'Naa wa\' he
Nugb…Ē ni n…õ…Ē %1$.1fmm y…õ naagbee %2$d %3$s l…õ esh…õ \'K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē…Ē\' he
Nugb…Ē ni n…õ…Ē %1$.1fmm y…õ naagbee %2$d %3$s l…õ esh…õ \'Kw…õm…Ē\' he
Nugb…Ēshiim…Ē ni naa wa he k…Ēk…Ēb…Ē…Ēi?
K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē…Ē k…õji nugb…Ē l…õ fa fe husu ni naa wa ni dam…Ē nugb…Ē l…õ be n…Ē
Nugb…Ēshiim…Ē ni Naa Wa He K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē…Ē
K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē…Ē k…õji nugb…Ē ni n…õ…Ē l…õ fe k…Ēk…Ēb…Ē…Ē husu ni dam…Ē nugb…Ēshiim…Ē be n…Ē
K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē…Ē k…õji nugb…Ē l…õ fa fe watsi husu ni dam…Ē nugb…Ē l…õ be n…Ē
Ani oy…õ n…Ēmimaa ak…õ oosum…Ē ni ojie data f…õ…õ?
K…õji oojie saji ni ats…Ē…Ē hi…õ ats…Ē…Ē l…õ lolo
K…Ēk…Ēb…Ē…Ēi k…õyashi shii eny…Ē daa gbi k…õji hulutsoo be l…õ sh…õ husui ni ok…õto l…õ he
Too nibii heei, shi n…Ē ko b…õ ni ato he gb…õjian…Ē lolo
Tsakem…Ē be mli ni ojo…Ē foi
Ak…õ URL to n…Ē ni ato l…õ he loo n…Ē ko b…õ mli
K…õ tsakem…Ē bei p…Ēt…õ…õ atsu nii
E ny…õ we n…õ e k…õ ngm…õ…õ a URL n…õ ts…Ē…Ē mi …Ē he
Eny…õ…õ…õ ek…õ n…Ē ni ats…Ē…Ē mli l…õ ab…Ē he loo ok…õwo n…Ē
Eny…õ…õ…õ ek…õ %1$s ab…Ē loo ejie k…õj…õ %2$s
Eny…õ…õ…õ ek…õ rada= mfoniri l…õ ab…Ē loo ejie k…õj…õ intan…õt l…õ n…Ē
E ny…õ we n…õ o k…õ to he loo e je sisije …Ē k…õ je o server …Ē mi
Eny…õ…õ…õ ok…õ w…õbkaam mfoniri ko atsa loo ok…õ o-websaiti l…õ n…Ē
Eny…õ…õ…õ ejie %1$s l…õ ejaak…õ URL l…õ b…õ n…Ē ko n…Ē ko
Webcam URL l…õ jeee n…Ē ni atooo loo eb…õ n…Ē ko
Kul…õ esa ak…õ atsake shi WiFi b…õ
